name: Crazy Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place liners in cups of a muffin tin, set aside.
Combine flour, cornmeal, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl. Toss together with a fork.
Add butter, milk, sour cream, and maple syrup to the bowl and blend with a spoon. Even when this batter is blended, it will still have a few lumps.
Crack eggs into a separate bowl and whisk until blended. Add them to the batter with pecan pieces. Blend.
Spoon batter into muffin cups until they are 3/4 full. Put oven mitts on and carefully place the tin in the oven.
Bake for 25 minutes.
Turn off the oven and, with mitted hands, remove the tin and set it to cool on a cooling rack for 10 minutes.
With your hands covered, tip the tin over and let muffins fall out. Use a table knife to loosen stubborn muffins.
Let them cool completely before wrapping in plastic wrap and freezing. Makes 12 muffins.
